name: Lever

install_fields.label: API Key
install_fields.description: Lever API key from Settings → Integrations → API Credentials.

description: Sync candidates, job postings, and pipeline data from Lever ATS.

apis.name: Sync
apis.description: Sync all Lever resources into the knowledge base.

apis.name: List Opportunities
apis.description: Fetch all Lever opportunities (candidates) across all pages.

apis.name: List Postings
apis.description: Fetch all Lever job postings across all pages.

apis.name: List Users
apis.description: Fetch all Lever users (team members) across all pages.

apis.name: List Interviews
apis.description: Fetch all Lever interviews across all pages.

apis.name: List Offers
apis.description: Fetch all offers for a specific opportunity.

apis.name: Get Opportunity
apis.description: Fetch a single opportunity by ID.
